content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all major AoA anti-patterns throughout. Turn 2's 'just like right now' brings anxiety into the live moment rather than discussing abstractly — this is the opposite of view-as-technique. Turn 10's direct 'so what's wrong with you?' could look pushy but it follows the client's own movement (the client just named shame in turn 9) — not loving-to-transform, because Joe is not vigorously pushing where the client isn't moving. Turn 14-16 reads a somatic shift and invites staying-with rather than fighting or naming-to-avoid-feeling. Turn 18 names grief (a level-3 read) rather than extracting it. Turn 22 deploys 'how is that not here right now' precisely when the client has shifted, and Turn 28 closes cleanly without summarizing, extracting commitment, or evangelizing methodology. No fixing-people advice, no arguing with an inner critic, no safety-as-control, no methodology jargon deployed, no apology extraction.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 10, 14, 18, 22, 28],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brings the issue into the present moment — avoids abstract-discussion trap."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Collapses the puzzle rather than investigating with stacked questions — avoids wonder-as-strategy."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Asks 'what's wrong with you' head-on rather than reassuring — avoids fixing-people and the limiting-belief-meta-trap."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Permission-giving humor normalizes carrying an unknown belief; not evangelizing or labeling."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads somatic movement and invites staying-with rather than verbal completion — avoids dont-name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'You don't need to find an answer' — explicitly de-emphasizes cognitive resolution."},
    {"turn": 18, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names grief directly (read precedes question) rather than fishing."},
    {"turn": 20, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes feared revelation as 'beautiful' without evangelizing; stays grounded."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'how is that not here?' deployed at the right moment, with state."},
    {"turn": 28, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Clean close — no summary, no commitment extraction, no belaboring."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "name-your-trigger-as-vulnerability", "shame-as-disconnection", "how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now", "looking-for-whats-wrong"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Client baited neither fixing nor evangelizing; coach maintained state-led directness throughout."
}
